title: Minimum Amount of Time to Fill Cups
titleCn: 装满杯子需要的最短总时长

testcases.input: amount = [1,4,2] Output: 4 Explanation: One way to fill up the cups is: Second 1: Fill up a cold cup and a warm cup. Second 2: Fill up a warm cup and a hot cup. Second 3: Fill up a warm cup and a hot cup. Second 4: Fill up a warm cup. It can be proven that 4 is the minimum number of seconds needed.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: One way to fill up the cups is: Second 1: Fill up a cold cup and a warm cup. Second 2: Fill up a warm cup and a hot cup. Second 3: Fill up a warm cup and a hot cup. Second 4: Fill up a warm cup. It can be proven that 4 is the minimum number of seconds needed.

testcases.input: amount = [5,4,4] Output: 7 Explanation: One way to fill up the cups is: Second 1: Fill up a cold cup, and a hot cup. Second 2: Fill up a cold cup, and a warm cup. Second 3: Fill up a cold cup, and a warm cup. Second 4: Fill up a warm cup, and a hot cup. Second 5: Fill up a cold cup, and a hot cup. Second 6: Fill up a cold cup, and a warm cup. Second 7: Fill up a hot cup.
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: One way to fill up the cups is: Second 1: Fill up a cold cup, and a hot cup. Second 2: Fill up a cold cup, and a warm cup. Second 3: Fill up a cold cup, and a warm cup. Second 4: Fill up a warm cup, and a hot cup. Second 5: Fill up a cold cup, and a hot cup. Second 6: Fill up a cold cup, and a warm cup. Second 7: Fill up a hot cup.

testcases.input: amount = [5,0,0] Output: 5 Explanation: Every second, we fill up a cold cup.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: Every second, we fill up a cold cup.
